instruction: Write a Common Lisp macro `with-temp-package` that creates a fresh package with a unique name, binds it to a variable for body, and deletes the package in an unwind-protect cleanup.
original_failure_log_excerpt:
MISMATCH
EXPECTED: (LET* ((#:G1 (FORMAT NIL "TMP-~A" (GENSYM)))
                 (P (MAKE-PACKAGE #:G1 :USE '(:CL))))
            (UNWIND-PROTECT (PROGN (INTERN "FOO" P)) (DELETE-PACKAGE P)))
ACTUAL:   (LET* ((#:G112 (FORMAT NIL "TMP-~A" (GENSYM)))
                 (P (MAKE-PACKAGE #:G112 :USE '(:CL))))
            (UNWIND-PROTECT (PROGN (INTERN "FOO" P)) (DELETE-PACKAGE P)))

--- stderr ---
